column1:
Define data science and explain its interdisciplinary nature involving computer science and statistics.  
Compare and contrast the roles and tasks of data scientists, computer scientists, and statisticians.  
Identify key historical milestones and developments in the evolution of data science from the 1960s to the present.  
Describe the emergence and impact of programming languages and software tools that advanced data science.  
Recognize current and emerging methods in data science, including statistics, machine learning, and artificial intelligence.
